caption: In a brightly lit room, three people are seated at a light-colored wooden table. Two men wear blue scrubs; one has a surgical mask pulled down around his neck and rests his hand near his mouth, while the other wears a black face mask and rests his chin on his hand. A woman sits opposite them wearing a dark blazer over a blue top, gesturing with her hands as she speaks. On the table are several white pieces of paper, a smartphone, and a brown cylindrical thermos. A purple logo and the text "Day 4" appear in the lower left, and the text "Sim Week" with a smaller sub-caption appears in the lower right. As the sequence progresses, the woman continues to talk and gesture, and the man in the scrubs without a mask shifts his hand position slightly, while the other participants remain relatively still, listening to her.
